description_long: This is a rectangular clutch-style handbag with a structured form and a fold-over flap. The exterior features a woven or printed pattern resembling a snakeskin or zigzag motif in shades of beige, brown, and black, with a single red circular accent at the center of the flap. The bag is bordered and accented with black piping, which outlines the edges and flap. A single, thin, black strap is attached at both ends, allowing the bag to be carried over the shoulder or as a crossbody. The back of the bag continues the patterned design without the red accent, and the sides reveal the slim profile of the bag. The overall appearance is both modern and slightly exotic, suitable for urban or evening use.
description: Rectangular clutch handbag with a snakeskin-like zigzag pattern, black piping, and a thin black shoulder strap. Features a red circular accent on the front flap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the patterned flap with a red circular accent and black piping, along with the full length of the black strap.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile of the bag and the attachment of the black strap at the top corner.
description_view_2: Back view displays the continuous zigzag pattern without the red accent, bordered by black piping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slimness and strap attachment, mirroring the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: A red circular emblem is present at the center of the front flap; no recognizable brand logo.
attribute_strap_type: Single, thin, fixed-length shoulder or crossbody strap attached at both ends.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Fold-over flap closure, likely secured by a magnetic snap or button beneath the flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: Red circular accent on the front flap; otherwise, none.
attribute_pattern: Snakeskin-inspired zigzag geometric pattern in beige, brown, and black.
